narrative:
Youri Tielemans is a key central midfield presence for Belgium. His overall rating of 7.37/10 places him in the top 1% of central midfields at this tournament. This rating reflects a blend of his club form over the last two seasons and his current World Cup performances.

Tielemans demonstrates a significant attacking influence at this World Cup, scoring 0.468 goals per 90 minutes, a notable increase from his club rate of 0.039. He also contributes creatively with 1.636 key passes per 90 minutes. In contrast, his defensive output is more modest, with 0.935 tackles and 0.234 interceptions per 90 minutes.

Tielemans is clearly a central figure in Belgium's midfield, providing both goal threat and creative spark. Scouts should monitor if he can sustain his high attacking output, specifically his 0.468 goals per 90 minutes, against stronger opposition. His overall rating range of 7.01–7.73 also suggests room to observe his consistency as the tournament progresses.
